use_cases: Pre-launch landing page for products or services with animated reveal
Coming soon page for websites, apps, or events
Maintenance or under-construction page with stylish typography
Seasonal announcement banners with staggered text animations
Product reveal or teaser sections for marketing campaigns
ai_summary: A dark-themed coming soon landing page component featuring animated typography that reveals 'COMING SOON', 'Mishra Hub', and 'Summer 2025' text with staggered fade-in and slide-up effects using Framer Motion. The component triggers animations on mount with a timeout delay, creating an elegant pre-launch experience with responsive sizing across mobile and desktop viewports.
